tipRules.tip: Johnston: For Century Club smallmouth weights, fish a drop shot with 6th Sense Party Minnow and prototype minnow baits. Use 3/8-oz weight regardless of conditions but change presentation -- dead still on calm days, drag through on rough days.

knowledge.insight: Johnston: First angler to earn a Bassmaster Century Club Belt with all smallmouth (100-5 in 2022). Repeated it with 102 lbs in 2024. Key is committing to known big-fish areas even when conditions are tough.
